steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $3x^2+14x+17$, so B is correct.

steps.title: Track all three pieces
steps.content: The expression has three parts: $pv$, $-2p$, and $+v$. The final $+v$ adds $x+5$, which is why the middle coefficient becomes $14$ instead of $13$.
